news.title: The director of the best Splinter Cell game reckons that modern lighting engines are making stealth games 'so much harder to read'

news.desc: "It gets very hard to tell what’s light, what’s shadow, what’s dark, what’s safe, what’s dangerous."
news.descEN: "It gets very hard to tell what’s light, what’s shadow, what’s dark, what’s safe, what’s dangerous."
